title: New Parents Mugs Mummy Daddy Newborn 12oz Bone China Luxury New Born Celebration Mug, Set of 2, For Home Kitchen Office
features: BEAUTIFUL QUALITY The Hugs & Kisses range is adorable and chic. The quality of the products featured in this and are second to none and each product is perfect to give as gifts for any occasion. The mugs are also made from New Bone China so quality is .
SIMPLE DESIGN The design of the mugs is simple and clean. One states Mummys Mug and is decorated in pink and the other states Daddys Mug and is finished with blue detail.

description: NEW PARENTS: These gorgeous mugs make the perfect gift for new parents who have just welcomed a new baby into the world.
